lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Ahoy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: I ferry skilled sailors and fisherfolk south t' the Spirit Anglers' base in the Ruins of Unkah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Spirit Anglers? Who are they?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Why, they're a group of sea-faring folk researchin' and fightin' against Tempoross, the crazed spirit that's terrorising the seas! I'm surprised you haven't heard!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds important! Can I help?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: It's rough out there against Tempoross. We really need fisherfolk who've experienced more of the world.

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: I can ferry ye down t' the Spirit Anglers, though they're looking for people with more fishing experience t' face Tempoross.

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Of course! I can ferry ye down there when ye be ready. Ye'll want t' speak to Captain Pudi when ye arrive!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I have to pay for the ferry?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: 'Course not. Don't even 'ave t' fix a price!

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Maybe next time, eh?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Captain Pudi mentioned you'd stopped by.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I certainly did! How is the fight against Tempoross going?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Well, that crazed spirit still terrorises the seas but wit' the 'elp of people like yeself, the Spirit Anglers are puttin' up a good fight!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's good! Can you ferry me to the Spirit Anglers?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Uh, ye seem different. I'm not sure ye be in the right place t' be facing Tempoross...

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Aye, that I can!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I have to pay for the ferry?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: 'Course not. Don't even 'ave t' fix a price!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where does your ferry go?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: South t' the Spirit Anglers' base in the Ruins of Unkah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you take me there?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: It's rough out there against Tempoross. We really need fisherfolk who've experienced more of the world.

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Would ye like t' board?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Aye aye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Just let me know when ye want t' be off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you ferry me to the Spirit Anglers?

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Uh, ye seem different. I'm not sure ye be in the right place t' be facing Tempoross...

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Aye aye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Take care!

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: It's rough out there against Tempoross. We really need fisherfolk who've experienced more of the world.

lines.speaker: Ferryman Sathwood
lines.text: Uh, ye seem different. I'm not sure ye be in the right place t' be facing Tempoross...
